original_reasoning: Shaking, trembling, and thunder-like disturbance align plausibly with what is troublesome or difficult.
From moving or setting upon something, حرك can deepen into undertaking or attempting an action.
If Greek κάλοισιν is in the rope-cable field, Arabic شنج with taut sinews preserves a clear tension-cord mafhum: stretched strands under pull.
Arabic includes soundness or propriety in things; Greek means cautious, reverent, morally careful.
القوم خرجوا من بلد إلى بلد preserves an outward-leading motion that plausibly aligns with the old core behind ἐξηγέομαι.
عذر carries excuse and shortcoming; abusive words sit on the opposing social side of blame and reproach.
A splinter is a cut-off short piece; Arabic shortness gives a plausible result-side bridge.
خزع carries a sense of removal or breaking away, and χάζομαι means to give way or retreat; the shared core is withdrawal.
